$comment: CC-MODE-HUB F1 — THE mode registry. Single source of truth for what a mode IS, where it appears, and who may see it. The Play hub renders only from this file; deleting an entry removes the mode from every surface with zero code changes (A1.1). DATA, not code: adding a mode is an entry here plus its implementation module, never a new conditional in a surface.
$provenance: Every field below is transcribed from SHIPPED behaviour, not invented. `status` follows each flag's compiled-in default in src/flags.rs; `kidSafe` mirrors `kid_ok` in tools_hub.rs's TOOLS table; `platforms` follows each flag's documented runtime gate; `nameKey`/`descKey` reuse the existing tools.* catalog entries (F2 forbids new auditable content, and these already exist in all 13 locales).

$deviations.tools_hub: F1/D1 says the settings toggles are DELETED and the registry replaces them. src/tools_hub.rs ('Pillar 3') shipped in build 55 (d9a6583) with its own 4-test E2E spec and is the ONLY way to flip a shipped-dark flag. Deleting it is a reversal of a days-old decision, so it is KEPT pending Eric. Consequence, stated plainly: until he rules, mode metadata lives here and tools_hub still owns its DOM-binding table (flag -> element ids). Those are different concerns, but `status`/`kidSafe` must not drift — whoever retires Pillar 3 should make it read this file.
$deviations.entitlementLevel: The spec models gating as a single CC-ENTITLEMENTS level. That does not cover photo_list, which needs the `photo_ocr` PARENT-PREMIUM boolean rather than a language level. Modelled as an extra `requiresPremium` field rather than mangled into entitlementLevel; flagged for Eric.
$deviations.online_spelloff: Not among the six modes CC-MODE-HUB names, but it is a shipped mode (332 lines, flag OFF pending backend deploy). A registry that omits a shipped mode is not a single source of truth, so it is here as coming_soon.
$deviations.attempts_shields: Deliberately ABSENT. It is a Climb mechanic, not a discoverable mode, and CC-MODE-HUB's constraints say shields belong to CC-CLIMB-SHIELDS. It stays a tools_hub row only.

$fields.status: live = renders as a tappable Play-hub tile. coming_soon = non-tappable teaser. hidden = renders nowhere, for anyone.
$fields.kidSafe: true = survives the Little Speller hub. Little Speller shows ABSENCE, not locks — the zero-purchase-surface doctrine carried over.
$fields.platforms: Where the mode can function at runtime. A mode absent on this platform does not tile.
$fields.entitlementLevel: Minimum per-language AccessLevel (none < preview < full). A mode requiring `full` on a previewed language is ABSENT, not locked (A2.3).
$fields.requiresPremium: Optional parent-premium entitlement (EntitlementSet boolean) this mode needs, or null. See $deviations.
$fields.languages: Language codes the mode supports, or null for any. Absent outside them.
$fields.ordering: Hub tile order = FILE order (D6, RECONSTRUCTED — Eric must confirm). No popularity sort, no per-user reordering in v1.

$decisionsPending: D6 (RECONSTRUCTED): tile ordering = registry file order. Implemented as stated; confirm.
D7 (RECONSTRUCTED): coming_soon tiles carry no notify-me hook in v1. Implemented as stated; confirm.
D1: whether tools_hub ('Pillar 3', build 55) retires in favour of this registry — see $deviations.

modes.$note: entitlementLevel `full` is not a guess: preview_allows() in entitlements.rs denies GameMode::GhostRace to Preview, so a previewed language cannot reach it.
es-only: it needs syllabification data, and absence is data-driven (CC-MODE-HUB I4.1).
kidSafe false is a COPPA hard-disable in Kid Mode, not a preference (flags.rs, tools_hub kid_ok=false).
The mode CC-MODE-HUB calls 'ocrMode'/'Photo/OCR' is `photo_list` in this codebase. Gated by the photo_ocr parent-premium entitlement — see $deviations.entitlementLevel.

F7 says ship coming_soon IF CC-SPELL-ALOUD is unimplemented. It IS implemented (src/spell_aloud.rs, 429 lines, 2 E2E tests), so this is live and routes into that flow — this file adds only the hub entry and forks none of that spec. Languages mirror VOICE_SPELL_LANGS.

F8/D5: hidden until spec'd and reviewed — a hard gate. The spec proposal ALREADY EXISTS: docs/word-stories-review.md (37e5a0f), which recommends keeping it hub-hidden pending (1) CC BY-SA attribution via the CC-WORDLIST-SOURCES Tier-B credits surface and (2) a kid-appropriateness spot-check of the en/es strings. Its flag is OFF for the same reason. `hidden` here matches all of that.
Flag OFF because /api/match is not deployed yet — 'ships dark until then' IS coming_soon. See $deviations.online_spelloff.
